title: Cobblemon - Genesis Forms
description: An all-in-one server-side gimmick and forms handler for Cobblemon 1.6.1 and above!
body:
# Genesis Forms
Genesis Forms is an all-in-one **server-side** gimmick and form change handling mod!

## Features
### Mega Evolution
- All Mega Accessories + Key Stone items
- All Mega Stones
- Mega Rayquaza if Dragon Ascent is known
- Mega Evolution outside of battles (toggleable)
- Custom Mega Stone Support

### Terastallization
- Tera Orb
- All Tera Shard items
- Tera type fix for Terapagos + Ogerpon (mask based)

### Z-Power
- Z Ring, Z Power Ring, Sparkling Stone items
- All Z Crystals
- Ultra Burst through Ultranecrozium-Z

### Dynamax
- Dynamax Band, Wishing Star
- Configurable Dynamax Animation
- Gigantamax gimmick
- Dynamax Candy (works outside of battle)
- Max Honey (works in & out of battle)
- Max Mushrooms [placeable] (works in battle)
- Max Soup (applies/removes GMax factor from Pokemon)

### Fusions
- All Fusion items
- All Fusions
- Custom Fusion Item Support
- Custom Fusion Support

### Other
- All Key Form Change Items (Adamant Crystal, Gracidea Flower, etc.)
- All Held Form Change Items (Rusted Sword, Red Orb, Arceus Plates, etc.)
- All In-Battle Form Changes (Hangry Mode, Sword Stance, etc.)
- Animation config for Mega Evolution, Tera, Z Power, and Dynamax Scaling

## Commands
**Base Command:**
- /genesis

**Give Commands:**
- /genesis giveMegaStone <player> <mega-stone>
  - Permissions: `genesisforms.giveMegaStone`
- /genesis giveZCrystal <player> <z-crystal>
  - Permissions: `genesisforms.giveZCrystal`
- /genesis giveTeraShard <player> <tera-shard>
  - Permissions: `genesisforms.giveTeraShard`
- /genesis giveKeyItem <player> <key-item>
  - Permissions: `genesisforms.giveKeyItem`
- /genesis giveHeldItem <player> <held-item>
  - Permissions: `genesisforms.giveHeldItem`
- /genesis giveBagItem <player> <bag-item>
  - Permissions: `genesisforms.giveBagItem`

 **Debug Commands:**
- /genesis resetData <player>
  - Permissions: `genesisforms.resetData`
- /genesis reload
  - Permissions: `genesisforms.reload`

## Credits
### Artists  
Tellapawn
- Meteorite, Reveal Glass, Prison Bottle, Zygarde Cube, Adamant Crystal, Lustrous Globe, Griseous Core, Gracidea Flower, DNA Splicers, Reins Of Unity, N Solarizer, N Lunarizer, Red Orb, Blue Orb, Shock Drive, Chill Drive, Burn Drive, Douse Drive, Teal Mask, Hearthflame Mask, Cornerstone Mask, Wellspring Mask, Wishing Star, Rotom Washing Machine  

Mogwe
- Pink Nectar, Purple Nectar, Yellow Nectar, Red Nectar, Rusted Sword, Rusted Shield, Dynamax Band, Max Soup, Max Mushrooms Item, Max Mushrooms Block, Dynamax Candy, Rotom Lawn Mower, Rotom Fan, Rotom Refrigerator, Rotom Light Bulb
- Adamant Orb, Adrenaline Orb, Berserk Gene, Booster Energy, Griseous Orb, Lucky Punch, Lustrous Orb, Macho Brace, Soul Dew  

Ironheader
- Arceus Plates  

Unariginal
- Tera Orb, Max Honey, Sparkling Stone, Z Ring, Z Power Ring
- Z Crystals
- Memory Discs
- Tera Shards
- Rotom Catalog, Rotom Microwave Oven  
- Legends ZA Mega Stones
- Mega Crystal, Mega Shard

Sanji  
- Mega Accessories

Cobblemon Team
- All mega stone textures

### Code
[Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown)
- A good portion of this mod is adapted from Mega Showdown's code, a client-side mod that implements Gimmicks and Form changes similar to this mod. Please support Yajat and their release!  

[Gimme That Gimmick](https://modrinth.com/mod/gimme-that-gimmick)
- The showdown scripts implemented in this mod to fix Dynamax and other slight issues are from Gimme That Gimmick. The showdown scripts are authored by Treynami. Please support Gimme That Gimmick's team and release!

### Other
Huge thank you to the other gimmick mods out there for creating a lot of the technology and ideas behind this mod! Please support their releases, and definitely use Mega Showdown if you aren't restricted to using Server-Side mods!! [Mega Showdown, Niko's Tera, Flourish, Cobblemon Megas, etc.]

Also, thank you to those who helped test this mod to ensure its quality! [TheWickening (SSMC/EeveeEmpire), Mousepal, Ironheader, Mogwe, etc.]
